summary: Supreme Court Decimates Voting Rights Protections for Black Voters, HBCU Consortium Launches Course-Sharing to Improve Graduation Timelines, Black Tech Founders Secure $643M in Q1 2026—Strongest Quarter Since 2022, Truth Initiative and NAACP Launch Breath of Freedom Movement on Tobacco Harm, 2026 BET Awards Celebrate Generational Black Excellence and Lineage, Spelman Names Roboticist Ayanna Howard as 12th President, International Black Theatre Festival Returns July 27–August 1, Crenshaw and Slauson Intersection Renamed Nipsey Hussle Square

George E. Johnson, Black Business Pioneer, Dies at 99, Black Women Disappearing From Labor Force Despite Rate Drop, HBCU Enrollment Boom: Spelman Becomes Highly Selective, 2026 BET Awards Honor Black Excellence Across Generations
Supreme Court Protects Lisa Cook's Fed Role From Trump, HBCU Leaders Convene in Atlanta for UNITE 2026, Patti LaBelle Honored as Culture Icon at Essence Fest
